suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0 launch readiness and execution-apis PR #770 status
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #78 set end-of-week targets for PR #770 implementation and DevNet 4/Glamsterdam DevNet 0 launch. This is now overdue and blocking the first merged BAL+ePBS devnet.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 full implementation status across clients
suggestions.rationale: BAL DevNet 3 had gas accounting disagreements between Geth/Nethermind. DevNet 4 spec included full EIP-8037 with dynamic state costs by end of last week. Need confirmation all clients aligned on the specification.

suggestions.topic: ePBS range sync security analysis results
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #78 tasked EL teams with analyzing security implications of CL syncing without payload envelopes. This is a critical architectural decision affecting ePBS devnet security model.

suggestions.topic: epbs-devnet-1 status and path to devnet-2
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #77 reported epbs-devnet-1 broken since launch, with devnet-2 planned after beacon state changes. No updates provided in ACDT #78.

suggestions.topic: Blob Delta Serum devnet expansion beyond Prysm/Lighthouse
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #78 noted only Prysm and Lighthouse deployed with partial cells. Need status on when other clients (Teku, Lodestar, Nimbus) will join to validate EIP-8136 broadly.

suggestions.topic: EIP-2780 final decision for Glamsterdam scope
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDT #77 for reassessment in ACDT #78, but not mentioned. Need explicit decision on whether this remains in Glamsterdam or is deferred to a later fork.

suggestions.topic: BAL benchmarking results with batch I/O prefetch flag
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #75 urgently requested this flag from Nethermind/Erigon for benchmarking, but no follow-up. If completed async, results would inform BAL optimization strategy.

suggestions.topic: Frame transaction mempool implementation strategy update
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #75 scheduled a breakout for mempool discussion (Strategy 2 canonical paymaster approach). No evidence this occurred; may need status update if work progressed async.
